_comment: WC2026 Group E, MD2. Calibrated with data as of 2026-06-20: MD1 results (Ecuador 0-1 Ivory Coast; Curacao 1-7 Germany), Opta consensus (Ecuador 86.1/9.2/4.7), FanDuel odds and O/U 3.5 Under -162. Lambdas built bottom-up; see notes.

meta.stakes: Both lost on matchday 1: practically elimination for the loser. Ecuador firm favorite; Curacao (debutant, smallest nation in World Cup history) comes off a 1-7 against Germany.

home.name: Ecuador
notes: Modest attack: Beccacece's low-scoring side (Under in 12 of 14). attack ~1.0 (average).
Elite defense (Pacho-PSG, Hincapie-Arsenal, Caicedo holding): that's why it MUCH lowers Curacao's lambda -> defense 0.55.
Faces the worst defense in the tournament: the lambda rises to ~2.3 because of the opponent, not from brilliance.
Must win; Curacao will park the bus after the 1-7, which dampens its efficiency somewhat.

away.name: Curacao
notes: Very weak defense (7 goals conceded against Germany): defense 1.7 (the leakiest in the group).
Poor attack against a top backline: attack 0.7. Scored 1 against Germany but in isolation.
Will sit back to avoid another rout; has no interest in opening up the match.

cards._referee: Istvan Kovacs (Romania). Career 4.47 YC/match; Romanian league 25/26 4.8; but Champions League 24/25 only 2.71 -> moderates a lot in elite international play.
